Saw II (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $87,025,093Details
International Box Office $65,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $152,925,093
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $44,973,368
Total $44,973,368
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$31,725,652 (36.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 30.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,949 opening theaters/2,949 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $162,374,007

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 28th, 2005 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: February 14th, 2006 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for grisly violence and gore, terror, language and drug content.
Franchise: Saw
Plot point: Escape, Non-Chronological, Serial Killer, Torture Porn, Trapped
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
